name: english-natsci-journal-skills
description: Agent skill stack for 100 mainstream English-language natural-science, clinical/medical, physical, and formal-science journals — the 'other 100' complementing the econ/business bundle. Covers the general-science triad (Nature, Science, PNAS), the Cell Press and Nature Portfolio families, the Physical Review family, the ACS/RSC/Wiley chemistry flagships, the big-four medical journals and major clinical society venues, and the top pure-math journals. One self-contained fit-and-house-style skill per journal, plus en-natsci-journal-workflow routing.
